Navigators are engaged community members: Navigators are engaged community members who help steer the ecosystem. They stake B3TR, publish their allocation rationale each round, and earn 20% of B3TR rewards from votes they manage.
Navigators are professional voters who s: Navigators are professional voters who stake B3TR to vote on your behalf.
Navigators are professional voting deleg: Navigators are professional voting delegates who stake B3TR to vote on behalf of citizens in allocation rounds and governance proposals. Citizens can delegate their VOT3 to a navigator and earn rewards without voting themselves.
Navigators are subject to protocol-enfor: Navigators are subject to protocol-enforced penalties designed to deter negligence and misconduct. Please acknowledge the following:
Navigators must stake B3TR tokens to reg: Navigators must stake B3TR tokens to register. Your stake determines how much VOT3 can be delegated to you (10:1 ratio). Staked B3TR can be withdrawn after exiting.
navigatorTasksInfoPreferences: Each round you must set your allocation preferences by voting on apps. This tells relayers how to cast votes for your delegated citizens. Preferences must be set before the cutoff deadline to give relayers enough time.
navigatorTasksInfoProposals: You must vote on every active governance proposal. Your decision is inherited by all citizens delegating to you.
navigatorTasksInfoReport: You may submit a report any round. After {{interval}} rounds without a new report, submitting one is required for compliance (and to avoid a missed-report infraction).
navigatorTasksInfoSlashing: Penalties only apply after a round has fully ended—not while it is still running. If you missed duties that round, you can receive at most one stake reduction for that round (governance sets the percentage; often about 5%). Several misses in the same round still count as one reduction. If your stake falls below the minimum, top up before you can accept new delegations.
navigatorVotePropagation: As a navigator, your vote will also set allocation preferences for all citizens delegating to you.
